'''dhazunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waacker|waacker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waacker|waacker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhazunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzinith|dhæzinith]] || [[word:dhæzinij|dhæzinij]] || [[word:dhæzinish|dhæzinish]] || [[word:dhæzini|dhæzini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazuzunuth|dhazuzunuth]] || [[word:dhazuzunuj|dhazuzunuj]] || [[word:dhazuzunush|dhazuzunush]] || [[word:dhazuzunu|dhazuzunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazunuth|dhazunuth]] || [[word:dhazunuj|dhazunuj]] || [[word:dhazunush|dhazunush]] || [[word:dhazunu|dhazunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazufnuth|dhazufnuth]] || [[word:dhazufnuj|dhazufnuj]] || [[word:dhazufnush|dhazufnush]] || [[word:dhazufnuf|dhazufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazunuthu|dhazunuthu]] || [[word:dhazunuju|dhazunuju]] || [[word:dhazunushu|dhazunushu]] || [[word:dhazunuku|dhazunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazunuth|dhazunuth]] || [[word:dhazunuj|dhazunuj]] || [[word:dhazunush|dhazunush]] || [[word:dhazunu|dhazunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazunuthul|dhazunuthul]] || [[word:dhazunujul|dhazunujul]] || [[word:dhazunushul|dhazunushul]] || [[word:dhazunukul|dhazunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazunuthuthu|dhazunuthuthu]] || [[word:dhazunujuju|dhazunujuju]] || [[word:dhazunushushu|dhazunushushu]] || [[word:dhazunuku|dhazunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazunuthun|dhazunuthun]] || [[word:dhazunujun|dhazunujun]] || [[word:dhazunushun|dhazunushun]] || [[word:dhazunukun|dhazunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazunuthuoro|dhazunuthuoro]] || [[word:dhazunujuoro|dhazunujuoro]] || [[word:dhazunushuoro|dhazunushuoro]] || [[word:dhazunukuoro|dhazunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
